headline: Square Client Wins Test Valuation Story For Block Shares
summary: Square, part of Block (NYSE:XYZ), has secured new clients The Pancake Parlour and The Fish Guy, expanding its presence in hospitality and specialty retail. These wins highlight adoption of Square’s integrated payments and operations platform by both multi location restaurant brands and independent retailers. The developments reflect further ecosystem expansion for Block’s seller business through technology led integrations. Block’s Square ecosystem is adding real world clients at a time...
